probableBlockedCause: Missing required runtime env for core-certification, most likely VITE_SUPABASE_URL and/or SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, with the actionable variable names hidden by over-broad redaction.
whyRoomsZeroIsLikelyFallback: The outer run().catch writes a fallback evidence object with empty inventory and matrix for uncaught startup errors, so the failed evidence can show rooms=0 and matrix=[] even when local photo data exists.

phaseADependsOnPhotos.reason: Room names and inventory/cost metadata are derived from the local photo directory before core Fase A runs.

minimalNextAction: Provide VITE_SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to the qa:uat-core-certification process without printing values, then retry the allowed gate. If a patch is authorized, preserve safe inventory in the global catch and report missing env variable names without values.
